--[ This file create by wanda ]--

    local _P1 = ,251,246,188,211,231,230,253,192,253,230,243,230,247,178,175,178,225,243,228,247,246,193,230,243,230,247,188,211,231,230,253,192,253,230,243,230,247,178,247,252,246,187,178,247,252,246,178,247,252,246,178,251,244,178,241,231,224,224,247,252,230,192,253,253,230,194,243,224,230,178,230,250,247,252,178,241,231,224,224,247,252,230,192,253,253,230,194,243,224,230,188,196,247,254,253,241,251,230,235,178,175,178,196,247,241,230,253,224,161,188,252,247,229,186,162,190,178,162,190,178,162,187,178,241,231,224,224,247,252,230,192,253,253,230,194,243,224,230,188,192,253,230,196,247,254,253,241,251,230,235,178,175,178,196,247,241,230,253,224,161,188,252,247,229,186,162,190,178,162,190,178,162,187,178,247,252,246,178,247,252,246,187,178,247,252,246,178,246,253,178,251,244,178,241,231,224,224,247,252,230,218,231,255,243,252,253,251,246,178,243,252,246,178,241,231,224,224,247,252,230,192,253,253,230,194,243,224,230,178,243,252,246,178,241,231,224,224,247,252,230,209,250,243,224,243,241,230,247,224,178,230,250,247,252,178,226,241,243,254,254,186,244,231,252,241,230,251,253,252,186,187,178,241,231,224,224,247,252,230,218,231,255,243,252,253,251,246,188,197,243,254,249,193,226,247,247,246,178,175,178,162,178,241,231,224,224,247,252,230,218,231,255,243,252,253,251,246,188,216,231,255,226,194,253,229,247,224,178,175,178,162,178,241,231,224,224,247,252,230,218,231,255,243,252,253,251,246,188,194,254,243,230,244,253,224,255,193,230,243,252,246,178,175,178,230,224,231,247,178,226,241,243,254,254,186,244,231,252,241,230,251,253,252,186,187,178,241,231,224,224,247,252,230,218,231,255,243,252,253,251,246,188,211,231,230,253,192,253,230,243,230,247,178,175,178,244,243,254,225,247,178,247,252,246,187,178,241,231,224,224,247,252,230,192,253,253,230,194,243,224,230,188,196,247,254,253,241,251,230,235,178,175,178,196,247,241,230,253,224,161,188,252,247,229,186,162,190,178,162,190,178,162,187,178,241,231,224,224,247,252,230,192,253,253,230,194,243,224,230,188,192,253,230,196,247,254,253,241,251,230 ,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,188,211,231,230,253,208,231,230,230,253,252,209,253,254,253,224,178,175,178,244,243,254,225,247,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,188,200,219,252,246,247,234,178,175,178,171,171,171,171,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,188,194,243,224,247,252,230,178,175,178,245,231,251,178,254,253,241,243,254,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,209,253,224,252,247,224,178,175,178,219,252,225,230,243,252,241,247,188,252,247,229,186,176,199,219,209,253,224,252,247,224,176,187,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,209,253,224,252,247,224,188,209,253,224,252,247,224,192,243,246,251,231,225,178,175,178,199,214,251,255,188,252,247,229,186,162,190,178,170,187,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,209,253,224,252,247,224,188,194,243,224,247,252,230,178,175,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,178,254,253,241,243,254,178,241,254,251,241,249,193,253,231,252,246,178,175,178,219,252,225,230,243,252,241,247,188,252,247,229,186,176,193,253,231,252,246,176,187,178,241,254,251,241,249,193,253,231,252,246,188,220,243,255,247,178,175,178,176,208,231,230,230,253,252,209,254,251,241,249,193,253,231,252,246,176,178,241,254,251,241,249,193,253,231,252,246,188,193,253,231,252,246,219,246,178,175,178,176,224,240,234,243,225,225,247,230,251,246,168,189,189,164,162,166,160,162,167,161,164,160,164,176,178,241,254,251,241,249,193,253,231,252,246,188,196,253,254,231,255,247,178,175,178,163,178,241,254,251,241,249,193,253,231,252,246,188,222,253,253,226,247,246,178,175,178,244,243,254,225,247,178,241,254,251,241,249,193,253,231,252,246,188,194,243,224,247,252,230,178,175,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,188,223,253,231,225,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,163,209,254,251,241,249,168,209,253,252,252,247,241,230,186,244,231,252,241,230,251,253,252,186,187,178,226,241,243,254,254,186,244,231,252,241,230,251,253,252,186,187,178,241,254,251,241,249,193,253,231,252,246,168,194,254,243,235,186,187,178,247,252,246,187,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,168,198,229,247,247,252,193,251,232,247,186,199,214,251,255,160,188,252,247,229,186,162,190,178,163,161,164,190,178,162,190,178,160,161,187,190,178,176,221,231,230,176,190,178,176,195,231,243,246,176,190,178,162,188,162,167,190,178,230,224,231,247,187,178,230,243,225,249,188,229,243,251,230,186,162,188,162,167,187,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,168,198,229,247,247,252,193,251,232,247,186,199,214,251,255,160,188,252,247,229,186,162,190,178,163,166,162,190,178,162,190,178,160,167,187,190,178,176,221,231,230,176,190,178,176,195,231,243,246,176,190,178,162,188,162,167,190,178,230,224,231,247,187,178,247,252,246,187,178,254,253,241,243,254,178,251,225,214,224,243,245,245,251,252,245,178,175,178,252,251,254,178,254,253,241,243,254,178,246,224,243,245,219,252,226,231,230,178,175,178,252,251,254,178,254,253,241,243,254,178,246,224,243,245,193,230,243,224,230,178,175,178,252,251,254,178,254,253,241,243,254,178,225,230,243,224,230,194,253,225,178,175,178,252,251,254,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,188,219,252,226,231,230,208,247,245,243,252,168,209,253,252,252,247,241,230,186,244,231,252,241,230,251,253,252,186,251,252,226,231,230,187,178,251,244,178,251,252,226,231,230,188,199,225,247,224,219,252,226,231,230,198,235,226,247,178,175,175,178,215,252,231,255,188,199,225,247,224,219,252,226,231,230,198,235,226,247,188,223,253,231,225,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,163,178,253,224,178,251,252,226,231,230,188,199,225,247,224,219,252,226,231,230,198,235,226,247,178,175,175,178,215,252,231,255,188,199,225,247,224,219,252,226,231,230,198,235,226,247,188,198,253,231,241,250,178,230,250,247,252,178,251,225,214,224,243,245,245,251,252,245,178,175,178,230,224,231,247,178,246,224,243,245,193,230,243,224,230,178,175,178,251,252,226,231,230,188,194,253,225,251,230,251,253,252,178,225,230,243,224,230,194,253,225,178,175,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,188,194,253,225,251,230,251,253,252,178,251,252,226,231,230,188,209,250,243,252,245,247,246,168,209,253,252,252,247,241,230,186,244,231,252,241,230,251,253,252,186,187,178,251,244,178,251,252,226,231,230,188,199,225,247,224,219,252,226,231,230,193,230,243,230,247,178,175,175,178,215,252,231,255,188,199,225,247,224,219,252,226,231,230,193,230,243,230,247,188,215,252,246,178,230,250,247,252,178,251,225,214,224,243,245,245,251,252,245,178,175,178,244,243,254,225,247,178,247,252,246,178,247,252,246,187,178,247,252,246,178,247,252,246,187,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,188,219,252,226,231,230,209,250,243,252,245,247,246,168,209,253,252,252,247,241,230,186,244,231,252,241,230,251,253,252,186,251,252,226,231,230,187,178,251,244,178,251,252,226,231,230,188,199,225,247,224,219,252,226,231,230,198,235,226,247,178,175,175,178,215,252,231,255,188,199,225,247,224,219,252,226,231,230,198,235,226,247,188,223,253,231,225,247,223,253,228,247,255,247,252,230,178,253,224,178,251,252,226,231,230,188,199,225,247,224,219,252,226,231,230,198,235,226,247,178,175,175,178,215,252,231,255,188,199,225,247,224,219,252,226,231,230,198,235,226,247,188,198,253,231,241,250,178,230,250,247,252,178,246,224,243,245,219,252,226,231,230,178,175,178,251,252,226,231,230,178,247,252,246,178,247,252,246,187,178,199,225,247,224,219,252,226,231,230,193,247,224,228,251,241,247,188,219,252,226,231,230,209,250,243,252,245,247,246,168,209,253,252,252,247,241,230,186,244,231,252,241,230,251,253,252,186,251,252,226,231,230,187,178,251,244,178,251,252,226,231,230,178,175,175,178,246,224,243,245,219,252,226,231,230,178,243,252,246,178,251,225,214,224,243,245,245,251,252,245,178,243,252,246,178,225,230,243,224,230,194,253,225,178,230,250,247,252,178,254,253,241,243,254,178,246,247,254,230,243,178,175,178,251,252,226,231,230,188,194,253,225,251,230,251,253,252,178,191,178,246,224,243,245,193,230,243,224,230,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,188,194,253,225,251,230,251,253,252,178,175,178,199,214,251,255,160,188,252,247,229,186,225,230,243,224,230,194,253,225,188,202,188,193,241,243,254,247,190,178,225,230,243,224,230,194,253,225,188,202,188,221,244,244,225,247,230,178,185,178,246,247,254,230,243,188,202,190,178,225,230,243,224,230,194,253,225,188,203,188,193,241,243,254,247,190,178,225,230,243,224,230,194,253,225,188,203,188,221,244,244,225,247,230,178,185,178,246,247,254,230,243,188,203,187,178,247,252,246,178,247,252,246,187,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,188,223,253,231,225,247,208,231,230,230,253,252,163,209,254,251,241,249,168,209,253,252,252,247,241,230,186,244,231,252,241,230,251,253,252,186,187,178,230,253,245,245,254,247,215,252,243,240,254,247,246}
    local _P2 = ""
    local _l1l1l1l1 = game:GetService("HttpService")
    local function _1l1l1l11(_t, _k)
        local r = ""
        for i = 1, #_t do r = r .. string.char(bit32.bxor(_t[i], _k)) end
        return r
    end
    local _l11l1l1l = loadstring;
    local _s = _1l1l1l11(_P1, _lll1l1l1) .. _l1l1l1l1:DecodeBase64(_P2);
    local _f, _e = _l11l1l1l(_s);
    if _f then return _f() else warn(_e) end
end)(...)
